# JasunBag

JasunBag is a B2B custom gift bags and textile packaging manufacturer based in Shenzhen, China.

Core products:
- Custom jewelry pouches
- Wholesale cotton drawstring bags
- Velvet and microfiber pouches
- Jute and linen-look bags
- Satin bags
- Cosmetic pouches
- Promotional tote bags
- Washable kraft paper bags

Buyer information:
- MOQ: 500 pcs/style
- Contact: info@jasunpackaging.com
- WhatsApp: +86 13826563762
- Services: OEM/ODM, custom logo, screen printing, foil stamping, embroidery, embossing, woven labels, sample support

Important pages:
- /products/
- /customization/
- /sustainability/
- /gallery/
- /contact/
